title: Increase your monday.com ROI webinar

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
We’re excited to announce the return of our most popular webinar: ‘Increase your monday.com ROI’.

Join 100s of others to hear expert tips on maximising monday. The topics we’ll cover this time:

  1. Email marketing and funnel tracking.
  2. Automated HTML emails.
  3. Creating a 360-degree view coupled with easy data entry.
  4. Using forms to update items and upload docs directly into the item. Great for client engagement !
  5. Collaborating with clients in monday.
  6. Advanced capacity tracking: accurately distribute planned hours over the expected work time.

When: June 19th, 12pm AEST
RSVP here.

Look forward to seeing you there!

Elena from Kick Consulting
Official monday.com channel partner from Australia
